top_signals.title: Gold Holds Drop as US-Iran Tensions Weigh on Inflation Outlook
top_signals.summary: Gold held a decline as traders weighed conflicting signals from the US and Iran ahead of fresh talks to end the war that’s fueled global inflationary pressures.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump says U.S. and Iran to hold fresh talks in Qatar on Tuesday following weekend clashes
top_signals.summary: The U.S. and Iran are poised to hold fresh talks on Tuesday in Qatar's capital, President Donald Trump said via social media on Monday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
